policy.direct_ddc_scope: Only compilers, compiler-like generators, and owned codegen wrappers are direct DDC targets.
policy.default_release_gate: Reproducible rebuild plus evidence bundle is required for release binaries.

controls: Cargo.lock must be honored with cargo --locked
RUSTFLAGS path remapping for workspace paths
two independent target directories must produce byte-identical binaries
bytecode or codehash comparison before deployment
compare rebuilt compiler or generator to released binary bit-for-bit
components.release_gate: scripts/ddc-verify.sh when a target is declared

controls: emit provenance and SBOM where the builder supports it
components.release_gate: docker buildx with provenance and SBOM enabled
